query:
SELECT ticker, COUNT(*) as count, MIN(date) as min_date, MAX(date) as max_date 
FROM historicalPrices 
WHERE ticker IN ('NOVN.SW', 'NESN.SW', 'AAPL.US', 'TSM')
GROUP BY ticker
LIMIT 10;
